creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
I've just updated portupgrade with portmaster.
portupgrade has moved to a new category, but portmaster
isn't fit to follow it when deleting distfiles:

| ===>   Registering installation for portupgrade-2.2.2_4,2
| ===>  Cleaning for portupgrade-2.2.2_4,2
| 
| ===>>> Upgrade for portupgrade-2.2.2_3,2 to portupgrade-2.2.2_4,2 succeeded
| cd: can't cd to /usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade
| 
| ===>>> No /usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade to cd to in order to delete
|        old distfiles, remove by hand if desired
